params.name: Fireflower
params.description: When digging in the Fissure, the snail encountered a grumpy plumber. He jumped right up and tried to stomp on the snail's shell without a word! After teaching him a fatal lesson, the snail found a fire flower on his body, which he seemed to have taken great care of.
params.ss1:
Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +10
Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
